params.name: window
params.description: Duration of time over which to query. Accepts units of time (e.g. 3d, 24h, 7d), relative time (e.g. yesterday, lastweek, lastmonth), or RFC3339 date pairs.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Field by which to aggregate results. Supported values include cluster, namespace, controllerKind, controller, service, deployment, statefulset, daemonset, job, label, annotation, pod, and container. Supports multi-aggregation via comma-separated values.

params.name: step
params.description: Duration of a single allocation set. If unspecified, this defaults to the window, so that you receive exactly one set for the entire window.

params.name: accumulate
params.description: If true, sum the entire range of sets into a single set.

params.name: idle
params.description: Whether to return idle cost. If true, idle allocations are returned.

params.name: filterLabels
params.description: Filter results by label in the format label:value (comma-separated).

params.name: filterAnnotations
params.description: Filter results by annotation in the format annotation:value (comma-separated).

params.name: shareIdle
params.description: If true, idle cost is allocated proportionally across tenants.

params.name: splitIdle
params.description: If true, idle cost is split into separate allocations by cluster and node.

params.name: idleByNode
params.description: If true, idle allocations are created on a per-node basis.

params.name: format
params.description: Output format. Supports csv and json.

items.docs: Retrieves cost allocation data for Kubernetes workloads, aggregated by the specified field over the given time window.

params.name: window
params.description: Duration of time over which to query.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Field by which to aggregate results.

items.docs: Returns a single total cost value for the given window, without individual allocations breakdown.
